title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs or chat models in chains, agents, RAG, etc.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive terminal UI (TUI) for chatting with Ollama models, browsing logs, and pulling models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive wrappers.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets a server chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to call Ollama chat/completions inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for LLM-based tests.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed requests/responses and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot that threads Ollama replies, supports multi-model selection and code syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on selected notes and insert generated text.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight Rust crate providing async wrappers over the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer-backed connection pooling and LiveView chat example.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library and CLI for Ollama with cross-compilation support for aarch64/x86_64.
